Nerf Build

24 dec 2021 - magnus høholt kaspersen

Recently, I’ve discovered my inner (non-professional) maker, which I’m really excited about.

One of my first projects was painting and weathering a Nerf-gun. I watch the Adam Savage video in which he paints, weathers and mods a really awesome looking gun.
